creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Piotr,

Thanks for the submission. There are a couple of issues with the port:

portlint -AC:

FATAL: /usr/home/fernape/FreeBSD-repos/ports/head/sysutils/neofetch/pkg-plist: [4]: Man pages must be installed into ``man'' not ``share/man''.
FATAL: /usr/home/fernape/FreeBSD-repos/ports/head/sysutils/neofetch/pkg-plist: [4]: Unpacked man file neofetch.1 listed.  Must be gzipped.

Would you mind to take a look at them?
